title: Harborline demo bootstrap, preflight, and presenter script
scope: Added a local Harborline demo preflight module and script entry point.

Preflight exercises the real FastAPI app with TestClient and validates health, seed, Verification Record, replay, mutation, scenario, Release Gate, evidence refs, certificate signature, and presenter UI anchors.
Added text and JSON report modes for presenter dry runs and CI-style evidence capture.
Added a Harborline presenter script with local-only setup, flow, evidence checklist, and stop boundaries.
Added regression tests for the preflight command/report.
acceptance: Presenter can run one local command before a demo and see pass/fail readiness.
Preflight proves the blocked before-fix gate and passing after-fix gate.
Three recorded dry runs can be captured as JSON without cloud or production access.
Presenter script preserves the scoped claim language and stop boundaries.
